about.title:
I don't just write code.
I build what people remember.
about.description_1: Antoine Quarroz, independent developer based in Valais. Since 2020, I've been guiding local businesses and startups from the first mockup to launch — no middleman, no vague deadlines.
about.description_2: Most developers don't think about design. Most designers don't think about performance. I work on both at the same time — because one without the other doesn't really serve anyone.
about.quote: Design attracts. Performance retains. And when both arrive fast — that genuinely changes something for a business.
